creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Raphael Kubo da Costa from comment #16)
> (In reply to Bryan Drewery from comment #14)
> > Can you also cat /usr/obj/usr/src/compiler-metadata.mk  to here?
> 
> I'm assuming you mean 
> /usr/obj/usr/src/tmp/usr/src/compiler-metadata.mk:

There's the bug, it's in the wrong directory. New patch coming shortly...

> 
> .info Using cached compiler metadata from build on bsdmonster at Wed Mar 22
> 17:27:26 CET 2017
> COMPILER_VERSION=40000
> COMPILER_TYPE=clang
> COMPILER_FREEBSD_VERSION=1200006
> .export COMPILER_VERSION  COMPILER_TYPE  COMPILER_FREEBSD_VERSION
